execution_policy_for_p5_t02.run_against: local synthetic API runtime only; capture before, write response, reload/read-back, and audit receipt before any PASS promotion
stop_conditions: baseline read shows non-synthetic or unexpected tenant data
write response lacks audit_event or state_idempotent flag
read-back route cannot observe the persisted field

matter_runtime.store_policy: local file-backed Matter runtime only; use existing 127.0.0.1:4180 synthetic runtime or LAWOS_MATTER_STORE_PATH when an isolated restart proof is required

matter_record_actions.store_policy: local Matter record-action runtime only; deferred until P5-T02/T04 can pair action output with read-back

client_record_actions.store_policy: local master-data/record-action runtime only; no client production data

crm_intake_runtime.store_policy: local CRM/intake runtime repositories only; no real client data

data_cloud_runtime.store_policy: local data-cloud enrichment runtime only; external provider receipts remain separate

import_data_mapping_runtime.store_policy: local import-data mapping runtime backed by Matter repository import records

finance_runtime.store_policy: local finance runtime repository only; no payment rails or production settlement claim
readback_routes: GET /api/finance/audit or relevant finance read route

analytics_report_runtime.store_policy: local analytics/report runtime repository only; no external BI publication claim

hrx_runtime.store_policy: local HRX durable runtime only; step-up and audit headers required; no payroll execution or external HRIS claim

admin_permission_runtime.store_policy: local admin-permission runtime only; no production permission broadening claim
